title: Super Backpack
body:
This mod adds super backpacks in basic, iron, gold, diamond, and netherite materials.

The number of slots is the same for all backpacks, but the maximum stack size per slot varies. Higher-tier backpacks can hold more items per slot.  
(Basic: 34, Iron: 32, Gold: 64, Diamond: 128, Netherite: 256)

The mod also features compatibility with **Avaritia**, **Better Manaita**, and **The Titans**, each providing corresponding material-themed backpacks.
